Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION
REFERRED TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Relates to the calculation of the maximum fee for health clubs
Summary: Relates to the calculation of the maximum fee for health clubs; allows the maximum annual fee amount to be adjusted for inflation based upon the US Consumer Price Index.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to the calculation of the maximum fee for health clubs
